name: USP消音版 | 阿尔卑斯迷彩
nameZh: USP消音版 | 阿尔卑斯迷彩
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted with a blue and purple camouflage. Pulled out of cold storage
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这款定制涂装为蓝色和紫色的迷彩图案。 取材于冷藏库
